ui.theChallengeDescription: Creating a visual language that resonates with the target audience while maintaining the core values of the client. The goal was to elevate the brand perception through high-end digital assets.
ui.theSolutionDescription: A strategic approach that blends modern aesthetics with functional design, ensuring maximum impact across all digital touchpoints.

services.sectionSubtitle: I don't just design; I build visual systems that solve business problems and drive attention.

list.title: Brand Design
list.description: Strategic visual identities that position your brand as a leader.

list.title: Video Editing
list.description: Cinematic storytelling that keeps viewers hooked from start to finish.

list.title: Social Media Content
list.description: Platform-native visuals designed for maximum attention and growth.

list.title: Creative Strategy
list.description: Consulting that aligns your visual output with business goals.

paragraphs: I'm Denis Alexandrescu, an Audiovisual Communication graduate with a deep passion for visual storytelling. My journey started with a camera and an obsession with how light and motion can change a person's perspective.

Today, I bridge the gap between pure creativity and business strategy. I don't just make things look "pretty"—I make them work. Whether it's a brand identity for a startup or high-conversion thumbnails for a creator, my focus is always on the outcome.
I've spent years refining my taste and technical skills to help brands stand out in a crowded digital landscape. I believe every pixel and every frame should serve a purpose.

process.sectionSubtitle: A structured approach to creativity that ensures consistency, quality, and results every single time.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We dive deep into your brand, goals, and target audience to find the unique angle.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: Developing a visual roadmap that aligns creativity with your business objectives.

steps.title: Creation
steps.description: The magic happens. High-fidelity design and editing with obsessive attention to detail.

steps.title: Optimization
steps.description: Refining and testing to ensure the final output delivers maximum impact.

contact.subheadline: Ready to elevate your visual presence? Let's build something that drives real business growth.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us when you fill out a contact form, request a quote, or communicate with us via email. This may include your name, email address, company name, and project details.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to respond to your inquiries, provide the services you request, send you technical notices and support messages, and communicate with you about products, services, and events.

sections.title: 3. Information Sharing
sections.content: We do not share, sell, or rent your personal information to third parties for their marketing purposes. We may share information with vendors, consultants, and other service providers who need access to such information to carry out work on our behalf.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We take reasonable measures to help protect information about you from loss, theft, misuse, unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction.

sections.title: 5. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.

sections.title: 2. Services Provided
sections.content: {name} provides creative services including but not limited to brand design, video editing, social media content creation, and creative strategy. Specific deliverables and timelines will be outlined in individual project proposals or contracts.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property
sections.content: Unless otherwise agreed upon in writing, all materials produced, including but not limited to designs, videos, and strategies, remain the intellectual property of {name} until full payment is received. Upon full payment, usage rights are transferred as specified in the project agreement.

sections.title: 4. User Responsibilities
sections.content: Clients are responsible for providing necessary materials, feedback, and approvals in a timely manner to ensure project deadlines are met. Delays in client communication may result in adjusted project timelines.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: In no event shall {name} be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the services.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content: For any questions regarding these terms, please contact:
